title: Adsamm® / 128 x self-stick felt pads / Ø 0.47'' (Ø 12 mm) / white / round / self-adhesive furniture glides with felt thickness of 0.059'' / 1.5 mm
features: Diameter 1.2 cm / white / round / particularly thin, strong self-adhesive and durable felt gliders with only 1.5 mm from Adsamm to protect against scratches, scrapes and movement noise for all light pieces of furniture, small furniture, children's furniture and items in the home, children's room, office, hotel, catering, nursery, school, etc.

Like all felt pads from Adsamm the thin felt is also suitable for smooth floors and surfaces such as parquet, marble, glass, natural stone, laminate, PVC, vinyl, rubber, metal, ceramic, wallpaper, wall etc.

Stick 1.5 mm thin felt pads from Adsamm to furniture legs and surfaces of light furniture and objects such as side table, coffee table, box, small shelf, small furniture, children's furniture, children's table, children's chair, floor lamp, vase, hifi device, speakers, sculpture, indoor flower pot, planter, fruit bowl, knife block, bread box, laptop, etc.
The top furniture gliders for gluing from Adsamm have already proven themselves 1000 times in household, commercial, hotel, catering, kindergarten, schools etc
Package contents: 128 extra thin self-adhesive felt gliders for gluing (= 1 sheet of 128 pieces) / available in various multi-sets / packaging units -> (click on Adsamm
description: Product Description Self-adhesive furniture gliders made of felt with thickness 1.5 mm in top quality from Adsamm The felt furniture gliders you have selected have the following features: Shape: round. Colour: white. Size: diameter 1.2 cm. Material: 100% viscose fibres, thickness 1.5 mm, weight 270 g/m² | hot melt adhesive. Versatile use for light furniture, small furniture, children's furniture and items - e.g. Light shelf, side table, coffee table, box, cupboard, children's table, children's chair, floor lamp, vase, hi-fi device, speaker, sculpture, indoor flower pot, planter, fruit bowl, coffee machine, sideboard, knife block, bread box, laptop etc. The felt has a thickness of only 1.5 mm - this is characterised by a subtle look and yet the highest possible durability. The high-quality thin felt glider from Adsamm reliably protects your furniture and floors from scratches and streaks, even unpleasant movement noise is significantly minimised or completely avoided. The top furniture gliders for gluing from Adsamm have already proven themselves 1000 times in household, commercial, hotel, catering, kindergarten, schools etc. Installation tips: 1) Clean the surface to be glued from dirt and grease. 2) Remove felt pads from the protective film and press firmly with the adhesive side onto the clean and dry area. 3) The piece of furniture approx. Do not use or move for 1 hour so that the adhesive strength can achieve the desired effect. Adsamm - quality since 2005 Safety Warning Please note: Before use, clean the surface of dirt and grease. After use, the piece of furniture approx. 1 hour do not use or move. The furniture gliders are highly self-adhesive and are difficult to remove after application.
